flow_description: Follow the steps below to install and launch ADB Device Manager on your Windows PC.

steps.title: Download ADB Device Manager for Windows
steps.description: Download the latest Windows installer (.exe) for ADB Device Manager from the official GitHub releases page.

steps.title: Open the Downloaded File
steps.description: Locate the downloaded installer file and double-click it to start the setup process.

steps.title: Click 'More Info' on Windows SmartScreen
steps.description: If Windows displays a SmartScreen warning, click on 'More info' to proceed with running the installer.

steps.title: Click 'Run Anyway'
steps.description: After expanding the SmartScreen details, click 'Run anyway' to continue launching the installer.

steps.title: Allow Administrator Permission
steps.description: When prompted by User Account Control (UAC), click 'Yes' to grant administrator permissions and continue installation.

steps.title: Choose Installation Options
steps.description: Click 'Next', optionally check 'Create a desktop shortcut', and continue by clicking 'Next' again.

steps.title: Click Install
steps.description: Review the installation settings and click the 'Install' button to begin installing ADB Device Manager.

steps.title: Finish and Launch the Application
steps.description: After installation completes, click 'Finish' to launch ADB Device Manager. The application will now open and be ready to use.
